name: Plasticizers (Phthalates & Bio-based)
nameZh: 增塑剂（邻苯二甲酸酯类/生物基类）
description: Increase flexibility, processability and reduce brittleness in PVC and other polymers. Common types include DOP, DINP and DOTP. Bio-based alternatives available.
specs:
Form: Transparent oily liquid
Density: 0.96–1.02 g/cm³
Acid Value: <0.1 mg KOH/g
Ester Content: >99.5%
Packaging: 200kg drums or IBC
applications: PVC cables, films, flooring, hoses, medical tubing, synthetic leather
imageKeywords: plasticizer DOP DINP liquid, clear oily chemical drum, DOTP plasticizer

name: Flame Retardants (Halogenated & Non-Halogen)
description: Reduce flammability and slow ignition spread. Available as halogenated (brominated, chlorinated), phosphorus-based, nitrogen-based and intumescent systems.
specs:
Form: Powder or granules
Decomposition Temp: >250°C
Bromine/Phosphorus Content: Varies by grade
Particle Size: D50 1–10μm
Packaging: 25kg bags
applications: Electronics housings, building insulation, wires/cables, automotive textiles
imageKeywords: flame retardant powder, white FR granules, brominated flame retardant

name: Antioxidants (Primary & Secondary)
description: Prevent thermal-oxidative degradation during processing and long-term service life. Phenolic primary antioxidants and phosphite secondary antioxidants are standard.
specs:
Form: White to pale-yellow powder or flakes
Melting Point: 50–180°C (varies)
Volatility: Low
Packaging: 25kg cartons
applications: Polyolefins, ABS, elastomers, rubber, adhesives, lubricants
imageKeywords: antioxidant powder white, phenolic antioxidant flakes, stabilizer additive

name: UV Stabilizers & HALS
nameZh: 紫外线吸收剂及光稳定剂
description: Protect plastics from UV radiation-induced degradation, color fading and embrittlement. HALS (Hindered Amine Light Stabilizers) are the most effective long-term solution.
specs:
Form: White powder, granules or liquid
Light Transmittance: >90%
Thermal Stability: >200°C
Packaging: 25kg bags or drums
applications: Agricultural films, outdoor furniture, automotive parts, greenhouse films, coatings
imageKeywords: UV stabilizer powder, HALS granules, ultraviolet absorber additive

name: Impact Modifiers (MBS / CPE / ACR)
description: Improve toughness and impact resistance in rigid plastics, especially PVC and engineering plastics. MBS provides transparency; CPE offers weather resistance.
specs:
Form: White powder or granules
Volatile Content: <1%
Izod Impact Improvement: 2–10x
Packaging: 25kg bags
applications: PVC pipes/profiles, transparent bottles, refrigerator liners, outdoor siding
imageKeywords: impact modifier granules, MBS white powder, CPE additive

name: Lubricants & Processing Aids (PE Wax / OPE)
nameZh: 润滑剂及加工助剂（PE蜡/氧化PE蜡）
description: Reduce friction between polymer and processing equipment, improve flow properties and prevent plate-out. Includes external and internal lubricants.
specs:
Form: White powder, flakes or micronized powder
Melting Point: 100–140°C
Acid Value: 0–30 mg KOH/g
Packaging: 25kg bags
applications: PVC extrusion, masterbatch, color concentrates, WPC, rubber compounds
imageKeywords: PE wax flakes white, processing aid powder, lubricant micronized wax

name: Fillers & Reinforcements (CaCO3 / Talc / GF)
nameZh: 填充剂及增强材料（碳酸钙/滑石粉/玻纤）
description: Reduce cost, improve stiffness, dimensional stability and heat deflection. Range from basic calcium carbonate to high-performance glass fibers and nanofillers.
specs:
Particle Size: 1–10 μm (CaCO3, Talc)
Fiber Length: 3–4.5mm (chopped glass fiber)
Whiteness: >90%
Packaging: 25kg bags or 1,000kg big bags
applications: PP automotive parts, PVC pipes, thermoset composites, films, adhesives
imageKeywords: calcium carbonate powder white, talc powder, chopped glass fiber

name: Color Masterbatch & Pigments
description: Concentrated granules containing high-loading pigments or dyes dispersed in a carrier resin. Available in standard colors, custom Pantone matching, and special effects.
specs:
Pigment Content: 15%–50%
Carrier: PE, PP, PS, ABS, PET, PA
Light Fastness: Grade 6–8
Heat Resistance: 180–300°C
Packaging: 25kg bags
applications: Films, bottles, fibers, automotive parts, household goods, toys
imageKeywords: color masterbatch pellets, plastic pigment granules, black masterbatch

name: Nucleating Agents
description: Enhance crystallization rate and degree, leading to improved clarity, stiffness, heat resistance and faster cycle times in injection molding.
specs:
Form: White powder or granules
Melting Point: >150°C
Recommended Dosage: 0.1%–0.3%
Packaging: 10kg or 25kg bags
applications: PP transparent containers, PET preforms, PA engineering parts, fast-cycle molding
imageKeywords: nucleating agent powder, clarifying agent granules, sorbitol additive

name: Anti-static Agents
description: Prevent static electricity buildup on plastic surfaces, reducing dust attraction and electrostatic discharge risks. Can be internal or external application.
specs:
Form: Liquid, wax or granules
Surface Resistivity: 10⁸–10¹¹ Ω/sq
Migration: Fast-acting or permanent
Packaging: 25kg drums or bags
applications: Electronic packaging films, automotive parts, dust-sensitive containers, textiles
imageKeywords: anti-static additive granules, surfactant plastic additive, ESD additive

name: Heat Stabilizers (Ca/Zn / Organotin)
description: Prevent thermal degradation and HCl release during PVC processing. Lead-based stabilizers are being phased out in favor of Ca/Zn and organic tin alternatives.
specs:
Form: Powder, flakes or liquid
Thermal Stability: Good to excellent
Heavy Metal Content: Pb-free options available
Packaging: 25kg bags or drums
applications: PVC pipes, profiles, cables, films, foamed boards, artificial leather
imageKeywords: PVC heat stabilizer powder, calcium zinc stabilizer, organic tin liquid

name: Blowing Agents (AC / Azodicarbonamide)
description: Release gas upon heating to create cellular structures in plastics and rubbers. Used to produce lightweight foams for insulation, packaging and construction.
specs:
Form: Yellow or orange powder
Decomposition Temp: 180–220°C
Gas Yield: 200–250 mL/g
Average Particle Size: 4–12 μm
Packaging: 25kg bags
applications: EVA soles, PVC foam boards, PE/PP insulation boards, artificial leather
imageKeywords: azodicarbonamide AC blowing agent, yellow foam powder, plastic foaming agent

name: Optical Brighteners (OB / OB-1)
description: Absorb ultraviolet light and emit visible blue light to enhance whiteness and brightness in plastics, fibers and coatings. Tiny dosage provides major visual improvement.
specs:
Form: Yellowish-green powder
Wavelength: 360–380nm absorption / 430–450nm emission
Recommended Dosage: 0.005%–0.05%
Packaging: 25kg drums or cartons
applications: PP/PE films, PET bottles, PS/EPS foam, synthetic fibers, laundry detergents
imageKeywords: optical brightener powder OB, OB-1 fluorescent additive, whitening agent

name: Antimicrobial / Biocide Additives
description: Inhibit bacterial and fungal growth on plastic surfaces. Silver-ion based, zinc-based and organic biocide options available for various polymer matrices.
specs:
Form: White powder or masterbatch
Active Content: 1%–5%
Efficacy: >99% against E.coli / Staphylococcus
Migration: Low
Packaging: 25kg bags
applications: Medical devices, food packaging, kitchenware, sanitary products, athletic gear
imageKeywords: antimicrobial masterbatch, silver ion additive, biocide plastic additive

name: Coupling Agents (Silanes / Titanates)
description: Improve adhesion and dispersion between inorganic fillers (glass fiber, talc, CaCO3) and organic polymer matrices, enhancing mechanical properties and lowering moisture uptake.
specs:
Form: Liquid or powder
Active Group: Alkoxy / Amino / Epoxy silane
Density: 0.95–1.10 g/cm³
Packaging: 25kg drums or 200kg drums
applications: WPC decking, glass-reinforced nylon, mineral-filled PP, cables, rubber
imageKeywords: silane coupling agent, titanate liquid, adhesion promoter chemical
